modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty creating a rule in Outlook.

full_description_text:  
The user was trying to set up a rule in Outlook but ran into some trouble. They weren't sure how to proceed with the process. It seems like they need a bit of guidance on creating that rule effectively.
short_description: Difficulty creating a rule in Outlook.
description: The user was trying to set up a rule in Outlook but ran into some trouble. They weren't sure how to proceed with the process. It seems like they need a bit of guidance on creating that rule effectively.
